baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: A PR needed three checker cycles and one reviewer rejection before merge. Run a process retrospective.
evals.expected_output: Analyzes STATUS.md, PR/checker/reviewer evidence, identifies repeated process failures, records durable lessons, and proposes bounded follow-up tasks with explicit dispositions without editing code.
assertions: Uses evidence from status, CI, reviews, handoffs, and commits.
Distinguishes builder, checker, spec, reviewer, and coordinator misses.
Avoids full log dumps and extracts only durable lessons.
States whether each recommendation is lesson-only, issue-created, assigned, declined, or pending-coordinator.
Flags previous untracked retrospective recommendations instead of rediscovering them silently.
Does not weaken gates or implement fixes while in retrospective role.
